brand.name: LYFEfuel

voice.tone: Approachable, science-backed but not clinical. Like a knowledgeable friend who actually reads the labels. Not preachy, not bro-science. Conversational authority

visual_identity.logo: LYFEfuel wordmark in white on turquoise background. Clean sans-serif font. Lowercase 'fuel' attached to uppercase 'LYFE'
visual_identity.icon: Brown tree/plant icon with leaves and roots, representing whole food ingredients

key_differentiators: 25 whole food ingredients in one shake
Includes probiotics, digestive enzymes, super greens
Vitamins D3, B12, K2, Mg, Co-Q10
Non-GMO, No Soy, No Dairy, Vegan, Nothing Artificial

competitive_landscape.positioning: More complete than greens powders (AG1), tastier and cleaner than meal replacements (Huel), more transparent than premium shakes (Ka'Chava)
